MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Deborah Neville. Arnole Evje, Esq. represented Plaintiff, San Francisco Housing Authority and there being no appearance by Defendant Luther Franklin, the matter is ordered off settlement conference, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
